mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, email, phone, avatar, score, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{avatar}, #{score}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM user
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET score = #{score}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
